title: Federal Reserve proposes rulemaking requiring stablecoin issuers to maintain customer identification program
message_html: Federal Reserve proposes rulemaking requiring stablecoin issuers to maintain customer identification program ...
snippet: The Fed rolled out a rule requiring stablecoin issuers to have a program in place to identify customers to combat illicit finance.

title: Zelle Readies Stablecoin for First Cross-Border Push

snippet: Zelle network operator Early Warning Services plans to launch a proprietary U.S. dollar-backed stablecoin as part of its strategy to expand Zelle person-to-person digital payments beyond the United States. title: Kraken integrates Solana DEX trading into core app, with support for additional networks planned
